---
title: "About"
draft: true
---

# About

<div class="profile-photo">
  <img src="/images/kris-lavenia.jpg" alt="Portrait of Kris LaVenia">
  <div class="profile-label">Kris LaVenia</div>
</div>

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

## My approach

::: {.card-grid}

::: {.card-soft}
### Warm and grounded
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Relational and respectful
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

::: {.card-soft}
### Trauma-informed
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
:::

:::

## Who I support

- Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet
- Consectetur adipiscing elit
- Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt
- Ut labore et dolore magna aliqua

::: {.cta-band}
## Want to know whether this feels like the right fit?

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.

[Get in touch](/contact.html){.btn-cp-primary}
:::
